change_details: Target the entropy sweet spot: raise entropy_bonus 0.0025 → 0.005. ent=0.008 prevented collapse decisively but kept pEnt flat at ~uniform (never learned), and ent=0.0025/0.004 frequently collapse. 0.005 is the midpoint — hypothesis is that it's high enough to resist the single-logit runaway mode seen at 0.0025 but low enough to permit gradients to push legal-move probabilities above uniform. This is the search direction implied by the entropy-axis data we now have.
